name: OfferNeoadjuvantForResidualDiseaseGuidedAdjuvantPlanning
title: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy when residual disease will guide adjuvant planning
description: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy to high-risk HER2-positive or triple-negative disease when residual disease findings will change adjuvant therapy.

coding.display: Hormone receptor positive with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative status
